zh.lifeSummary: 當Annora Luttrell於1270年之前出生在英國英格蘭時，她的父親Alexander Luttrell33歲，母親Margery Fitz Thomas34歲。她和Ralph FitzUrse leFizours II至少有2個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1321年之後在她的家鄉。

nameMeanings.name: Luttrell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): from a diminutive of Old French loutre ‘otter’ (from Latin lutra), applied as a nickname for someone thought to resemble an otter, or a metonymic occupational name for someone who hunted otters (for their pelts). Compare Luter and Litteral .

variants.name: Luter
meanings: from Old French loutre ‘otter’, either used as a nickname, or alternatively as a metonymic occupational name to denote an otter hunter.

nameMeanings.name: Annora
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Annora Luttrell was born before 1270, in England, United Kingdom, her father, Alexander Luttrell, was 33 and her mother, Margery Fitz Thomas, was 34. She had at least 2 sons and 2 daughters with Ralph FitzUrse leFizours II. She died after 1321, in her hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Annora Luttrell est née avant 1270, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Alexander Luttrell, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Margery Fitz Thomas, avait 34 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles avec Ralph FitzUrse leFizours II. Elle est décédée après 1321, dans sa ville natale.

ja.lifeSummary: Annora Luttrellが1270年以前にイギリスイギリスで生まれた時，父Alexander Luttrellは33歳，母Margery Fitz Thomasは34歳であった。彼女はRalph FitzUrse leFizours IIとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1321年以後に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Annora Luttrell(이)가 1270년 이전 영국 잉글랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Alexander Luttrell(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margery Fitz Thomas(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 Ralph FitzUrse leFizours II(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1321년 이후 그녀의 고향에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Annora Luttrell родилась перед 1270 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Alexander Luttrell было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Margery Fitz Thomas, 34.
